# Summary Table (ST) — Report

**Role:** Midwife (RHM)
**Purpose:** Auto-tallied monthly aggregation of all VALIDATED TCL records for the BHS, mapped to FHSIS indicator codes. The ST is the primary monthly output from each BHS, summarizing service coverage across all Tier 1 programs.
**FHSIS Reference:** FHSIS MOP 2018, Chapter 2 (Table 2 — submission schedule) + Chapters 4.2, 4.3, 5, 6 (per-program ST column guides)
**Who fills it:** Auto-generated by the tally engine from VALIDATED TCL data. Midwife reviews before submission.
**Who reviews/approves it:** Midwife reviews and submits; PHN consolidates 32 STs into MCT.
**Frequency:** Monthly. Deadline: Monday of the 1st week of the succeeding month.
**Storage location:** `summary_tables` table (one row per BHS per month).

---

## Required Fields

The ST is **not a data entry form** — it is an auto-generated report. The fields below are the columns/rows displayed to the Midwife for review before submission.

### ST Header

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| **Health Station Name** | String | From session context | |
| **Barangay** | String | | |
| **Reporting Month** | Integer | 1–12 | |
| **Reporting Year** | Integer | | |
| **Projected Population** | Integer | From `health_stations` or demographics | Denominator basis |
| **Total VALIDATED Records** | Integer (computed) | Count of records with `status = VALIDATED` for this BHS + period | Pre-flight info |
| **Total RETURNED Outstanding** | Integer (computed) | Count of `RETURNED` records not yet resubmitted | Warning indicator |
| **Total PENDING_VALIDATION** | Integer (computed) | Count of unreviewed records | Warning indicator |

### ST Body — Indicator Rows

Each row represents one FHSIS indicator. The auto-tally engine computes the numerator from VALIDATED TCL records.

| Column | Data Type | Notes |
|:-------|:----------|:------|
| **FHSIS Indicator Code** | String | DOH standard code — must match exactly (DM 2024-0007) |
| **Indicator Name** | String | Full indicator name |
| **Numerator — NHTS** | Integer | Count of NHTS clients meeting the indicator |
| **Numerator — Non-NHTS** | Integer | Count of Non-NHTS clients |
| **Numerator — Total** | Integer (computed) | NHTS + Non-NHTS |
| **Denominator** | Integer | Population-based (e.g., Pop × 2.056% for maternal) |
| **Coverage %** | Decimal (computed) | (Numerator / Denominator) × 100 |
| **Remark** | Text | Optional per-indicator note from Midwife |

### Program Sections in the ST

The ST contains indicator rows grouped by program cluster:

#### Maternal Care (from Maternal Care TCL)
- Pregnant women with ≥4 ANC check-ups (by age group: 10–14, 15–19, 20–49)
- Nutritional status — Normal BMI, Low BMI, High BMI (by age group)
- Td immunization — 1st pregnancy (Td1+Td2), 2nd+ pregnancy (Td2 Plus) (by age group)
- Iron with Folic Acid completed (by age group)
- Calcium Carbonate completed (by age group)
- Iodine supplementation (by age group)
- Deworming — pregnant women (by age group)
- Syphilis screening
- Hepatitis B screening
- HIV screening
- CBC/Hgb screening
- GDM screening
- Livebirths by birth weight (Normal, LBW)
- Deliveries by attendant (SBA, Non-SBA)
- Deliveries by place (Health Facility, Home, Other)
- Deliveries by type (Vaginal, CS)
- Pregnancy outcome (Full Term, Pre-Term, Fetal Death, Abortion/Miscarriage)
- Postpartum check-ups (≥2 for mother + newborn)
- Vitamin A (postpartum)
- Iron with Folic Acid (3 months postpartum)

#### Child Care — Part 1: Infants 0–11 months (from Child Care TCL Part 1)
- BCG coverage (by sex)
- HepB birth dose coverage (by sex)
- DPT-HiB-HepB 1/2/3 (by sex)
- PCV 1/2/3 (by sex)
- OPV 1/2/3 (by sex)
- IPV (by sex)
- MCV at 9 months (by sex)
- FIC (by sex)
- CPAB (by sex)
- Vitamin A (6–11 months, by sex)
- EBF (0–5 months)
- LBW infants given iron (1–3 months)

#### Child Care — Part 2: Children 12–59 months (from Child Care TCL Part 2)
- MCV at 12 months (by sex)
- Vitamin A (12–59 months, 2 doses, by sex)
- MNP (12–23 months)
- Deworming PSAC (1–4 years, 2 doses, by sex)
- Nutritional status (WFA, WFH classifications)
- Diarrhea cases given ORS/zinc
- Pneumonia cases given treatment
- Sick children given Vitamin A

#### Child Care — SAC and Adolescents
- Deworming SAC (5–9 years, by sex)
- Deworming Adolescents (10–19 years, by sex)
- School-based immunization: Td (Grade 1), MR (Grade 1), Td (Grade 7), MR (Grade 7)

#### NCD Prevention (from NCD TCL Part 1)
- Adults ≥20 risk-assessed (PhilPEN, by sex)
- Current smokers (by sex)
- Harmful alcohol use (by sex)
- Physical inactivity (by sex)
- Unhealthy diet (by sex)
- Newly identified hypertensives (by sex)
- Newly identified diabetics (by sex)
- Women screened for cervical cancer (VIA/Pap)
- Women with suspicious breast mass referred
- SC screened for visual acuity (by sex)
- SC given PPV (by sex)
- SC given influenza vaccine (by sex)

#### Infectious Disease — TB (from NTP Registry)
- DS-TB cases enrolled on treatment
- DS-TB Treatment Success Rate
- DR-TB cases enrolled on treatment

All indicators are further disaggregated by **NHTS / Non-NHTS** where specified.

---

## Optional / Conditional Fields

| Field Name | Data Type | Condition for Display | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:----------------------|:------|
| **Remark** | Text | Per indicator row | Optional annotation from Midwife |

---

## UX / Clinical Safety Concerns

- **Pre-flight check screen** — before generating the ST, display:
  - VALIDATED record count per TCL
  - RETURNED records still outstanding (with patient names)
  - PENDING_VALIDATION records still outstanding
  - Option: "Resolve outstanding" or "Proceed with current validated data"
- **ST Preview** — display as a table with: Indicator | Numerator (NHTS / Non-NHTS / Total) | Denominator | Coverage %. Print preview available.
- **Coverage anomaly highlighting** — flag any indicator where coverage >100% (data quality issue) or <50% (potential underreporting).
- **ST lock on submission** — once submitted, the ST cannot be edited. Status → `SUBMITTED`. Locked for audit.
- **Explicit confirmation on submission** — "Submitting the ST is final. It will be locked and transmitted to the PHN. Continue?" This is an irreversible action.
- **Audit trail** — submission creates an `audit_logs` entry with `action = 'ST_SUBMITTED'`, `reporter_id`, `timestamp`.
- **Print/Export** — ST must be exportable as PDF for physical filing and as Excel for PHN consolidation.

---

## Database Schema Notes

- **Table:** `summary_tables(id, health_station_id, reporting_month, reporting_year, status, submitted_at, submitted_by, indicators_json, population_denominator, created_at, updated_at)`.
- **Status enum:** `DRAFT` → `SUBMITTED` → `APPROVED_BY_PHN` (future).
- **`indicators_json`:** JSONB column containing the full indicator breakdown: `{ indicator_code: { nhts: n, non_nhts: n, total: n, denominator: n, coverage_pct: n, remark: "" } }`.
- **Alternative:** Normalize into `st_indicator_values(id, summary_table_id, indicator_code, nhts_count, non_nhts_count, total, denominator, coverage_pct, remark)`.
- **Indexes:** `(health_station_id, reporting_year, reporting_month)` — unique constraint.
- **RLS:** Midwife can only see STs for their `health_station_id`. PHN can see all 32.
- **Lock mechanism:** Once `status = SUBMITTED`, no UPDATE allowed on `indicators_json`. Enforced at API layer + DB trigger.
- **No soft delete** — STs are never deleted. They are archival reporting records.

---

## Reports and Exports

| Report Name | Type | Period | Source Data | DOH Standard Reference |
|:------------|:-----|:-------|:------------|:-----------------------|
| Summary Table (ST) | Auto-tallied aggregation | Monthly | All VALIDATED TCL records for this BHS + period | FHSIS MOP 2018, Chapters 4–6 (per-program ST column guides) |

The ST is the **input** for:
- **MCT (Monthly Consolidation Table)** — PHN consolidates 32 STs into one city-wide table
- **M1 Report** — service coverage extracted from ST
